ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the claim originated */,
  "enterprise_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of enterprise making the claim */,
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of claim */,
  "claim_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the claim occurred */,
  "product_insured_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that is insured */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed by the policyholder */,
  "close_amount" REAL /* Amount agreed upon to close the claim */,
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disposition of the claim */,
  "reporting_delay" INTEGER /* Delay in reporting the claim in days */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was reported */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the insurance policy */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claims adjuster assigned to the claim */,
  "claim_documents" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store document references or URLs */,
  "claim_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_site_id") REFERENCES claim_sites ("claim_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type_id") REFERENCES claim_types ("claim_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_product_insured_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_insured_id") REFERENCES products_insured ("product_insured_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_enterprise_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("enterprise_type_id") REFERENCES enterprise_types ("enterprise_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_disposition_id FOREIGN KEY ("disposition_id") REFERENCES dispositions ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code to identify the country of the city */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State or province code to identify the state or province of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enterprise_types" (
  "enterprise_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enterprise type */,
  "enterprise_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the enterprise type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the enterprise type */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Industry code to categorize the enterprise type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enterprise_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "claim_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the claim type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_sites" (
  "claim_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim site */,
  "claim_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the claim site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the claim site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products_insured" (
  "product_insured_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product insured */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product that is insured */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "value" REAL /* Insured value of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_insured_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "disposition_name" TEXT /* Name of the disposition outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disposition outcome */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disposition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store role permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being processed */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee processing the claim */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the processing event */,
  "next_action" TEXT /* Next action required for the claim */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Date by which the next action should be completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_processing_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_processing_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim affected by the action */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who took the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module of the system where the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who took the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who took the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being audited for compliance */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation being checked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance for the claim */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance audit was conducted */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the compliance audit */,
  "audit_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who conducted the audit */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_audit_by FOREIGN KEY ("audit_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body that issued the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim for which payment is made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment method */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)
